steps: resolve repository-relative installer and canonical launcher
validate the manifest and Windows Profile new-instance contract
resolve PowerShell 7 and WezTerm only in Apply mode
preserve any foreign shortcut with the requested name
atomically copy the canonical launcher and manifest to the user-local install root
create or refresh the owned desktop shortcut
read back target, arguments, icon, description, and delegation mode
emit local install receipt and English operator report
failureRules: missing canonical launcher blocks Plan and Apply
installation never launches tmux or WezTerm
handoff: Report shortcut path, installed launcher path, receipt path, validation state, proof ceiling, and the exact double-click or runtime-proof next action.
proofCeiling: Owned shortcut installation and readback only; no runtime window or tmux behavior.
